nasb.text: Now in the reign of Ahasuerus, in the beginning of his reign, they wrote an accusation against the inhabitants of Judah and Jerusalem.

esv.text: And in the reign of Ahasuerus, in the beginning of his reign, they wrote an accusation against the inhabitants of Judah and Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 亞哈隨魯在位的初期，他們寫了訴狀，控告猶大和耶路撒冷的居民。

ccb.text: 亚哈随鲁统治初期，他们写信控告犹大和耶路撒冷的居民。
